top_categories.workout_context: 75 miles on mixed terrain burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
60ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Gran Fondo Curacavi. Train it until it feels boring.
When someone attacks on mixed terrain, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
At Gran Fondo Curacavi, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Gran Fondo Curacavi's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 75 miles.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Gran Fondo Curacavi's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before April.
Base fitness for Gran Fondo Curacavi. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
The aerobic base that lets you ride mixed terrain at tempo for 75 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
Double-threshold training builds sustained power with less fatigue. More FTP per hour of training.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Gran Fondo Curacavi, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Varied gradients on mixed terrain demand climbing versatility. Sit the shallow stuff, stand the steep stuff, switch without thinking.

race_overlay.heat: April in Curacavi, Valparaiso Region, Chile can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before Gran Fondo Curacavi. Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Gran Fondo Curacavi’s 75 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Gran Fondo Curacavi. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Gran Fondo Curacavi requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mixed terrain to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, TT Threshold, and G Spot to prepare you for 75 miles of mixed terrain in Curacavi, Valparaiso Region, Chile.
